_comment: Settings for the weekly blog-writing agent. Edit `mode` to switch behaviour.

_mode_options.review: Agent opens a Pull Request with the new post for you to read & merge (nothing goes live until you approve).
_mode_options.auto: Agent commits the new post straight to main, so it publishes to firatbarca.com automatically.

author: Firat Barca
voice: First person, professional yet warm. Expert in ESG, sustainability, non-financial reporting, and political science (climate change & human mobility). Practical and credible, no hype or buzzword padding. European/British spelling. ~700-950 words.
